title: Drift Boats
description: Drift boats by Nitrrine. Updated to contain all boats.
body: # Drift Boats (1.15+) ## This is a changed version of the [Boatcars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/boatcars) resourcepack by [Nitrrine](https://modrinth.com/user/Nitrrine). ### Changes: - Added support for all boats, exclude rafts - Added emissive for headlights - Changes to description - Proper versioning (works without bugs only from 1.15) - Implemented supported_formats [![CEM](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/cem_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) [![Gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/drift-boats/gallery)
